insert into __PRS_OrderReport
(LanguageId	,
OrderTypeId	,
CompanyLogoImageId	,
ImportLogoImageId	,
Header	,
ItemsHeader	,
ItemsFooter1	,
ItemsFooter2	,
Footer11	,
Footer12	,
Footer13	,
Footer14	,
Footer15	,
Footer16	,
Footer21	,

Footer23	,
Footer24	,

Footer31	,

Footer36	,
LastUpdateTime	,
LastUpdateUserId	,
Address1	,
Address2	,
Address3	,
Address4	,
OrderNumberPO	,
DocumentType	,
OrderNumber	,
OrderDate	,
ClientNumber	,
InternalNumber	,
ShippingMethod	,
PaymentMethod	,
PaymentTarget	,
UST_ID	,
Position	,
Article	,
Description	,
Amount	,

BasisPrice150	,
Cu_G	,
Cu_Surcharge	,
UnitPrice	,
Designation	,
Unit	,
TotalPrice150	,
DEL	,
Cu_Total	,
UnitTotal	,
LastPageText1	,
LastPageText2	,
LastPageText3	,
LastPageText4	,
LastPageText5	,

Bestellt	,

Liefertermin	,

Abladestelle	,
SummarySum	,
SummaryUST	,
SummaryTotal	,
Lieferadresse	,
Footer17	,
Footer27	,
Footer37	,
Footer41	,
Footer42	,
Footer43	,
Footer44	,
Footer45	,
Footer46	,
Footer47	,
Footer51	,
Footer52	,
Footer53	,
Footer54	,

Footer56	,
Footer57	,

Footer62	,
Footer63	,
Footer64	,

Footer76	,
Footer77	,
Index_Kunde	,
ForDeliveryNote	,
DiscountText1	,
DiscountText2	,
DiscountText3	,
DiscountText4	,
DiscountText5	,
DiscountText6	,

FactoringText2	,
FactoringText3	,
FactoringText4	,
FactoringText5	,
FactoringText6	,

LastPageText11	,
ForPosDeliveryNote,

ArtikelStock,
ArtikelWeight,

CustomerNumber,

Designation2)
select 
LanguageId	,
OrderTypeId	,
CompanyLogoImageId	,
ImportLogoImageId	,
Header	,
ItemsHeader	,
ItemsFooter1	,
ItemsFooter2	,
Footer11	,
Footer12	,
Footer13	,
Footer14	,
Footer15	,
Footer16	,
Footer21	,
Footer22	,
Footer23	,
Footer24	,
Footer25	,
Footer26	,
Footer31	,
Footer32	,
Footer33	,
Footer34	,
Footer35	,
Footer36	,
LastUpdateTime	,
LastUpdateUserId	,
Address1	,
Address2	,
Address3	,
Address4	,
OrderNumberPO	,
DocumentType	,
OrderNumber	,
OrderDate	,
ClientNumber	,
'' as InternalNumber	,
ShippingMethod	,
'' as PaymentMethod	,
'' as PaymentTarget	,
'' as UST_ID	,
Position	,
Article	,
Description	,
'' as Amount	,
'' as PE	,
'' as BasisPrice150	,
'' as Cu_G	,
Cu_Surcharge	,
'' as UnitPrice	,
'' as Designation	,
'' as Unit	,
'' as TotalPrice150	,
'' as DEL	,
'' as Cu_Total	,
'' as UnitTotal	,
LastPageText1	,
LastPageText2	,
LastPageText3	,
LastPageText4	,
LastPageText5	,
LastPageText6	,
LastPageText7	,
LastPageText8	,
LastPageText9	,
'' as Bestellt	,
'' as Geliefert	,
'' as Liefertermin	,
'' as Offen	,
Abladestelle	,
SummarySum	,
SummaryUST	,
SummaryTotal	,
Lieferadresse	,
Footer17	,
Footer27	,
Footer37	,
Footer41	,
Footer42	,
Footer43	,
Footer44	,
Footer45	,
Footer46	,
Footer47	,
Footer51	,
Footer52	,
Footer53	,
Footer54	,
Footer55	,
Footer56	,
Footer57	,
Footer61	,
Footer62	,
Footer63	,
Footer64	,
Footer65	,
Footer66	,
Footer67	,
Footer71	,
Footer72	,
Footer73	,
Footer74	,
Footer75	,
Footer76	,
Footer77	,
'' as Index_Kunde	,
'' as ForDeliveryNote	,
'' as DiscountText1	,
'' as DiscountText2	,
'' as DiscountText3	,
'' as DiscountText4	,
'' as DiscountText5	,
'' as DiscountText6	,
'' as FactoringText1	,
'' as FactoringText2	,
'' as FactoringText3	,
'' as FactoringText4	,
'' as FactoringText5	,
'' as FactoringText6	,
'' as LastPageText10	,
'' as LastPageText11	,
'' as ForPosDeliveryNote,
ArtikelCountry,
ArtikelPrice,
ArtikelQuantity,
ArtikelStock,
ArtikelWeight,
CustomerDate,
CustomerNumber,
Designation1,
Designation2
from __PRS_DelieveryNoteReport
